name: vahanai
description: AI-powered predictive maintenance and driver safety platform for Indian commercial vehicle fleets

scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=server-dist/server.cjs && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=functions/server.cjs && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('functions/data', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('data/vahanai_db.json', 'functions/data/vahanai_db.json');"
